scope: Hash-bound offline parity for the canonical out-of-tree candidate; untested semantics, scheduler timing and electrical behavior are excluded

comparisons.evidence: driver_audit_static_final.json records two clean reproducible builds, an AArch64 REL module, exact imports, aliases and namespaces, and a fresh candidate hash match
abi_validation.json and header_layout_probe.json are current and pass Clang compile-time assertions against GKI 6.12.23
comparisons.note: The stock ELF independently fixes syna_spi_device at 0x3f0 bytes and release at +0x338

comparisons.evidence: KCFI section and type IDs match for 151/151 selected functions, including 143/143 callbacks in 8 recovered families
comparisons.note: Function size is non-gating because the OEM LTO pipeline is unavailable

comparisons.evidence: kcfi_full_surface.json matches 189/322 stock functions with recoverable preambles
comparisons.note: 133 signatures differ and 46 stock functions require separate preamble review

comparisons.evidence: reconstruction_map.json and module_decomposition_audit.json bind all 367/367 stock identities to source, pseudocode, P-Code and AArch64 assembly
comparisons.note: Structural identity is not semantic equivalence

comparisons.evidence: symbol_inventory_kmi_exact_final.json records no missing stock text symbol and no missing or unexpected import
comparisons.note: 151 candidate-only text symbols are classified and non-gating (decompiler_subroutine=131, duplicate_renamed=9, other=9, signature_wrapper=2)

comparisons.evidence: microtask_progress.json promotes 123/367 current-source tasks from 7 sanitizer-backed host reports with zero stale PASS demotions
comparisons.note: This PASS covers only the attested subset; 244 functions remain unvalidated

comparisons.evidence: No ADB, fastboot, insmod, rmmod, SPI, IRQ or partition operation was performed
comparisons.note: Controlled NX809J hardware validation remains a separate gate

blockers: Full KCFI surface has 133 mismatched function signatures
O6 has 123 hash-attested PASS microtasks and 244 tasks still requiring direct evidence
Controlled NX809J hardware validation is deferred
